_comment: Lanes are REUSABLE NATO slots (alpha..echo + chore-modularize): the worktree is a persistent execution slot; the task/role/allowed_paths/skills are reassigned per round via the .pm bus. PM-owned (single writer). 'name' (friendly) is decoupled from 'branch' so we never have to rename a branch mid-round.
namingConvention: Slots: alpha, bravo, charlie, delta, echo, chore-modularize. A slot takes a fresh feat/<area> or chore/<area> or fix/<area> branch per assignment. NEVER rename a branch with an open PR or mid-round. Physical `git worktree move` only when that slot's VS Code window is CLOSED.
_reconciled: 2026-06-17Ts — STABILIZATION round assigned (user: iron out all bugs + verify all-brand seed before new features). Files: outbox/<slot>/2026-06-17s__*.md; prior round (Back-Office Wave 1) archived. DISJOINT path ownership → all 6 run in parallel. Run /start-lane in each window. Key recovery: #51 Report Builder GHOST-MERGED (tip only) → charlie re-lands. Playwright now runs locally in-sandbox (D17).

slots.name: charlie
slots.task: RE-LAND the Report Builder UI — #51 shows merged but origin/main has only the stub (ghost merge). Rebase e84b9ba onto main, flip mock→live (#50 reporting API), VERIFY the 6 reports/ files actually land. HIGH/flagship recovery.

slots.name: bravo
slots.task: OPERATOR DASHBOARD fixes (territory work merged #52): (1) HIGH clear selectedRow on period/territory filter change so the detail drawer doesn't show stale rows; (2) MED suppress flat sparkline when max===min. Do NOT regress empty-state honesty.

slots.name: chore-modularize
slots.task: BACK-OFFICE HOME honesty: flip the Territories card status 'soon'→'live' (the explorer is merged/live). Keep Reports/Users/Catalog 'soon' (genuine stubs) — but flip Reports→'live' once charlie re-lands. DEFER the m2 prettier sweep until reports/** is settled.

slots.name: alpha
slots.task: ALL-BRAND SEED-QUALITY audit + reporting integrity (user directive). Per-brand coverage matrix across both seed planes; verify /api/reports/* returns good per-brand data live; assess the deferred EF read-model swap (D3, now unblocked). Report findings; PR only if fixing seed gaps.

slots.name: delta
slots.task: INFRA/CI: add a local dev run script that rm's the stale hfc-demo.db before boot (EnsureCreated won't migrate); flip the backoffice prettier lint gate to BLOCKING once backoffice/** is clean on main (after charlie+chore). Route the EF-migrations question to alpha (api/** out of lane).

slots.name: echo
slots.task: Rebase #53 onto main (resolve smoke-api.sh ADDITIVELY — union with the live reports block); adopt the NEW local-browser Playwright recipe (D17) and wire a runnable helper into e2e/; verify this round's fixes locally in-browser (booking #55, re-landed report builder, territory drill-down). Runs LAST.
